title: How Reacher is Transforming TikTok Shop Affiliate Marketing: Success Stories
description: TikTok Shop is an emerging leader in social commerce, and we at Reacher have been working hard to help brands scale their sales and ride the e-commerce wave. Keep reading this blog post to see exactly how Reacher has helped our customers grow their GMV, reach out to influential TikTok creators, and more!
author: Reacher Katie

images.alt: Reacher TikTok Shop affiliate marketing success metrics

contentHtml:
TikTok Shop is shaking up e-commerce, and we at Reacher have been working hard to help brands make the most of it. We've built software that's making a real difference in how businesses connect with creators and boost their sales. Let's take a look at what we've been able to do for our clients across different industries.

Numbers Don’t Lie

Here's a quick look at what Reacher has helped our customers accomplish:

  • $4.1 million in sales (GMV) generated in just 30 days.
  • An average of 75 sample requests sent out daily per shop.
  • About 16% of creators respond for every 1,000 messages we send.
  • Some brands have seen their sales grow by over 2,250% in two months.

Real Stories from Different Industries

We can't name names, but here are some examples of how real brands are growing with Reacher:

Supplements and Health

  • A UK-based brand selling organic protein powders and vegan supplements went from zero to £100,000 in sales in three months. They were struggling to stand out in the crowded supplements market, but TikTok Shop opened up a whole new customer base for them.
  • Another company offering brain health supplements saw their sales skyrocket by 3000% in a month, hitting over £3,000. Their unique focus on cognitive enhancement really resonated with TikTok's younger audience, and Reacher helped target their samples to the right creators in that space.

Beauty and Personal Care

  • A brand known for their eco-friendly period products sold over 50,000 items and grew their sales by 200%. They found that TikTok was the perfect platform to educate and break taboos around menstrual health.
  • A haircare brand specializing in curly hair products increased their sales by 55%, making over $38,000 in their first month with us. Their before-and-after videos became hugely popular on the platform.
  • One beauty brand focusing on Korean-inspired skincare is now earning over $25,000 a month just from affiliate sales. They've found great success partnering with skincare enthusiasts and dermatologists on TikTok.

Cosmetics

  • A cruelty-free makeup brand hit $311,076 in sales in one month, a 166% increase after they started using Reacher. Their colorful, highly pigmented products were a hit with makeup artists and beauty influencers on the platform.

Why Reacher Works

Our software is effective for a few key reasons:

  1. We help brands reach out to lots of creators efficiently, matching products with the right influencers.
  2. We're good at getting creators to engage with brands, helping to build authentic partnerships.
  3. Our tools can help brands grow their sales quickly by optimizing their TikTok Shop strategy.

We're Always Improving

Our team at Reacher is constantly working on new features to make our software even better. Recently, we've been focusing on:

  • Building better tools to analyze shop performance, helping brands understand what content drives sales.
  • Creating ways to help brands manage increased sales as they grow, from inventory management to customer service.
  • Improving how brands can work with creators, including better tracking of influencer performance.

Our goal is to keep up with the fast-paced world of TikTok Shop and give our clients the best tools possible.

It's Not Just for Beauty and Supplements

While we've talked a lot about supplements, beauty, and cosmetics, Reacher isn't just for these industries. We've designed our software to work for all kinds of products. Whether you're selling handmade jewelry, eco-friendly home goods, or the latest tech gadgets, if you can sell it on TikTok Shop, we can probably help you sell more of it.

We take care of the complicated stuff - reaching out to creators, managing emails, sending samples, and now even analyzing sales data. This lets brands focus on what they do best: making great products that people love.

Interested in seeing how Reacher could help your brand on TikTok Shop? Get in touch with us. We'd love to show you what we can do for your specific products and market.

Thanks for reading!
Reacher Katie
